name: csa-loom-unity
description: CSA Loom Unity — self-hosted OSS Unity Catalog server packaged for Azure Government (where Databricks Unity Catalog is unavailable/limited). Thin config-rendering overlay on the official unitycatalog/unitycatalog image; H2-file-DB default on Azure Files, Postgres opt-in, optional ADLS credential vending. Azure-native, no Microsoft Fabric dependency.
